info.name: Approach1-PostSimAggregation-MultiContract-100K-30d
info.description:
APPROACH 1: POST-SIMULATION AGGREGATION

PROBLEM: ACTUS contract state is contract-scoped. TBill-A's MD event
(+$24,500 cash inflow) does NOT automatically update a shared 'cashBalance'
variable that the StableCoin-Liability contract can read during simulation.

WORKAROUND: Reference indexes (SC_CASH_MC_100K_01 etc.) are STILL
pre-computed static data fed to behavioral models DURING simulation.
However, AFTER simulation completes, the test script performs true
cross-contract aggregation of all actual ACTUS events.

WHAT THIS PROVES:
  1. Whether the pre-computed indexes match the actual contract events
  2. The true cash balance trajectory from aggregated payoffs
  3. Where discrepancies exist between assumed vs actual state

LIMITATION (STATED HONESTLY):
  - Behavioral models (BackingRatioModel) DURING simulation still read
    from pre-computed static indexes, NOT from live aggregated state.
  - This approach is ANALYSIS, not real-time feedback.
  - Approach 2 (Sequential Simulation with Feedback Loop) solves this.

Open Postman Console (Ctrl+Alt+C) before running.

exec: console.log('   ⚠️  This is NOT derived from contract events.');
console.log('   Post-sim aggregation will compare actual vs this.');
console.log('   ⚠️  Day 15 jump $1K→$26K was MANUALLY calculated.');
console.log('   Post-sim aggregation will verify this.');
console.log('✅ SC_PEG_RISK_100K_01: Peg risk score loaded');
console.log('   ⚠️  During sim, this reads STATIC indexes, not live aggregated state.');
// Store raw simulation output for Phase 4
console.log('  Contract: ' + c.contractId + ' | Status: ' + c.status + ' | Events: ' + evtCount);
var payoff = (e.payoff !== undefined && e.payoff !== null) ? e.payoff : 0;
console.log('  Total events across all contracts: ' + totalEvents);
console.log('  ⚠️  NOTE: Each contract\'s events are ISOLATED.');
console.log('  TBill-A MD payoff does NOT appear in StableCoin-Liability state.');
console.log('  Phase 4 will aggregate these cross-contract.');

item.name: 4.1 Aggregate: Cash Balance from All Contract Events

exec: // This request is a NO-OP HTTP call.
// All logic is in the test script which reads sim_output from Phase 3.
// We use a simple GET to the risk service health endpoint.
console.log('METHOD: Iterate ALL events from ALL 5 contracts.');
console.log('Track a single cashBalance variable updated by each event.');
console.log('This is what ACTUS cannot do natively (contract-scoped state).');
console.log('❌ No sim_output found. Did Phase 3 run?');
// ── Step 1: Collect ALL events from ALL contracts ──
// ── Step 2: Sort ALL events by time (chronological) ──
console.log('Total events across all contracts: ' + allEvents.length);
// ── Step 3: Walk through events, maintain running cash balance ──
// Track the cash timeline for comparison
// Track per-day snapshots (keyed by date string)
// ── Determine cash impact by event type + contract ──
// IED events for T-Bills that happened BEFORE sim start (statusDate)
// These are historical — cash already spent.
// We do NOT debit again; the $6K initial cash is post-purchase.
explanation = 'T-Bill purchased (HISTORICAL, pre-sim, no current cash impact)';
// Stablecoin supply established — tokens minted, protocol received cash
// This was the original mint that created the $100K supply.
// The cash from this is already distributed across T-bills + cash reserve.
explanation = 'Supply established $' + Math.abs(evt.payoff).toFixed(2) + ' (HISTORICAL, cash already allocated)';
// T-Bill maturity: par value flows into cash
explanation = 'MATURITY → +$' + evt.payoff.toFixed(2) + ' cash inflow (par value received)';
// Prepayment = redemption. Holders burn tokens, receive cash.
// Negative payoff on liability = cash outflow from reserves
// Positive PP payoff could be a mint (new supply)
cashImpact = evt.payoff; // positive = cash inflow from mint
explanation = 'PP monitoring event (no cash movement, model check only)';
// Interest payment — 0 for both zero-coupon T-bills and 0%-rate stablecoin
// Compute live T-bill aggregate (remaining alive bills at par)
// Log only events with cash impact or key milestones
console.log('    Portfolio: Cash=$' + cashBalance.toFixed(2) + ' + TBills=$' + tbillAgg.toFixed(2) + ' = Total=$' + totalReserves.toFixed(2));
pm.test('Cash balance computed across contracts', function(){

item.name: 4.2 Compare: Pre-Computed Indexes vs Actual Aggregated

exec: console.log('The pre-computed SC_CASH_MC_100K_01 index was loaded in Phase 1.');
console.log('The actual cash was aggregated from contract events in Phase 4.1.');
console.log('Any DISCREPANCY means the static index was wrong — the behavioral');
console.log('models during simulation operated on incorrect data.');
// Pre-computed cash values from SC_CASH_MC_100K_01 (what we loaded in 1.3)
console.log('❌ No daily_snapshots. Did Phase 4.1 run?');
var delta = actual !== null ? (actual - expected) : null;
console.log('  The BackingRatioModel during simulation read the PRE-COMPUTED');
console.log('  cash values. If those differ from the ACTUAL aggregated cash,');
console.log('  the behavioral model made decisions based on WRONG data.');
console.log('  This is the core limitation of Approach 1.');
console.log('  → Approach 2 (Sequential Simulation) fixes this by feeding');
console.log('    actual T-bill event outputs INTO the reference index before');
console.log('  → Approach 3 (Portfolio State Service) fixes this with a');
console.log('    middleware that updates indexes in real-time during simulation.');
console.log('✅ All pre-computed values match actual aggregated values.');
console.log('   (This means our manual calculations were correct for this scenario.)');
console.log('   However, this match is NOT guaranteed — it depends on the');
console.log('   behavioral model not changing contract payoffs in unexpected ways.');
console.log('PHASE 4.3: DAILY PORTFOLIO DASHBOARD (from aggregated events)');
console.log('This is the CROSS-CONTRACT view that ACTUS cannot produce natively.');
console.log('Each row shows the portfolio state AT END OF DAY, computed by');
console.log('aggregating ALL events from ALL 5 contracts up to that date.');
console.log('DATE         | CASH        | T-BILLS     | TOTAL RES   | SUPPLY      | BACKING  | LIQUIDITY | ACE');
// ACE policy checks (from design doc thresholds)
console.log('  Both must pass for ✅; either fail = 🚫 (mint halted)');
console.log('  🚫 Stress period: ' + stressDates[0] + ' to ' + stressDates[stressDates.length-1]);
console.log('     Minting would be HALTED during this period.');
console.log('     Minting would RESUME from this date.');
console.log('  This dashboard is POST-HOC analysis. During the actual simulation,');
console.log('  the BackingRatioModel read PRE-COMPUTED static indexes — NOT these');
console.log('  dynamically aggregated values. If the pre-computed values were');
console.log('  wrong, the model would have made incorrect halt/resume decisions.');
console.log('  Approach 2 (Sequential Simulation) and Approach 3 (Portfolio State');
console.log('  Service) address this by feeding actual outputs back as inputs.');
pm.test('Dashboard rendered with stress detection', function(){
console.log('PHASE 4.4: MATURITY LADDER — ACTUAL vs EXPECTED');
// Find actual MD events from aggregated timeline
var actualMD = timeline.filter(function(e){ return e.type === 'MD' && e.contractId.indexOf('TBill') === 0; });
console.log('  ⚠️  No T-Bill MD events found in simulation output.');
console.log('    a) ACTUS engine returned events in a different structure');
console.log('    b) T-Bill contracts did not generate MD events');
console.log('    c) The simulateTo date did not reach all maturity dates');
var expected = expectedMaturities.find(function(e){ return e.contractId === md.contractId; });
console.log('  ' + status + ' ' + md.contractId + ' | ' + matchDate + ' | payoff=$' + md.cashImpact.toFixed(2));
console.log('     ❌ Date mismatch: expected ' + expected.date + ', got ' + matchDate);
console.log('     ❌ Amount mismatch: expected $' + expected.par.toFixed(2) + ', got $' + md.cashImpact.toFixed(2));
console.log('  Actual MD events found: ' + actualMD.length);
console.log('✅ All 4 T-bill maturities generated MD events.');
console.log('⚠️  Mismatch: expected ' + expectedMaturities.length + ' MD events, got ' + actualMD.length);
